news.headline: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes emphasizes fiat liquidity over price targets in Bitcoin trading. Focus on growth expectations.
news.summary: Arthur Hayes, a co-founder of BitMEX and Chief Investment Officer at Maelstrom Fund, discussed the importance of fiat liquidity in Bitcoin (BTC) trading in an interview. He stressed that traders should prioritize assessing the expected growth of fiat liquidity rather than fixating on specific price targets for Bitcoin. Hayes highlighted the significance of understanding the relationship between the anticipated increase in fiat liquidity needed to support Bitcoin's price and the actual statements made by politicians and central bankers. The interview can be found on a finance news website.

news.headline: Echo Water and 10X Health System partner to co-brand and distribute Echo Flask for hydrogen therapy. Expanding reach to enhance health and wellness.
news.summary: Salt Lake City and Miami - Echo, a prominent developer in hydrogen water therapy, and 10X Health System, a wellness firm co-founded by entrepreneurs Grant Cardone and Brandon Dawson, have revealed a strategic alliance. Under this partnership, the renowned Echo Flask will be rebranded and marketed under the 10X Health System's label, broadening its availability to a larger customer base seeking to enhance their health and wellness through hydrogen-infused water. The Echo Flask, known for its...

news.headline: Fluidra to propose dividend of 0.60 euros/share, 50% payout of 2024 profit, totaling around 115 million euros.
news.summary: Fluidra, a leading global company in pool and wellness equipment and solutions, announced a proposal during its Board of Directors meeting to suggest a dividend of 0.60 euros per share to the upcoming General Shareholders’ Meeting. This proposed dividend aligns with Fluidra’s policy of distributing 50% of the 2024 Adjusted Net Profit. The total expected payout, which is contingent on approval at the General Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for May 7th, 2025, is approximately 115 million euros.

news.headline: Cummins and Isuzu Motors to unveil zero-emissions powertrain for Isuzu F-Series truck at 2027 production with innovative features.
news.summary: In Columbus, Indiana, Accelera™ by Cummins, the zero-emissions division of Cummins Inc. [NYSE: CMI], has partnered with Isuzu Motors Limited to unveil a cutting-edge battery electric powertrain for the F-series medium-duty truck. This new powertrain will be showcased at the upcoming ACT Expo in Anaheim, California. Slated for release in 2027, the integrated powertrain will include Accelera's advanced battery, eAxle, accessories, and controls. This innovative solution aims to assist fleets in decarbonizing operations.

news.headline: Acuren Corp (NYSE: TIC) announced Q4 and full year 2024 results. Includes ASP Acuren Acquisition.业 Successo period Jul 30-Dec 31.
news.summary: In Tomball, Texas, Acuren Corporation (NYSE American: TIC) disclosed its financial outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2024. As a top provider of essential asset integrity services, the company highlighted its operating performance, particularly influenced by the recent acquisition of ASP Acuren Holdings, Inc. known as the "ASP Acuren Acquisition." This financial report covers the time from July 30, 2024, to December 31, 2024, referred to as the "Successo."

news.headline: Generation Mining updates Feasibility Study for Marathon Copper-Palladium Project in Ontario. All amounts in Canadian dollars ($).
news.summary: In Toronto, Generation Mining Limited (TSX: GENM; OTCQB: GENMF) has reported promising findings from the revised Feasibility Study ("2025 FS") for the Marathon Copper-Palladium Project situated close to the Town of Marathon in Northwestern Ontario. The Project has shown positive results, with all financial figures denoted in Canadian dollars ("C$"). The study includes references to quantities in millions of pounds ("Mlbs") and millions of ounces ("Moz").

news.headline: Americas Gold and Silver Corp. reports full-year 2024 results with positive outlook for 2025. TSX: USA, NYSE: USAS.
news.summary: In Toronto, Americas Gold and Silver Corporation (TSX: USA) (NYSE American: USAS) announces its financial and operational results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The North American precious metals producer highlights its consolidated performance for the period. It is advised to review the detailed Management's Discussion and Analysis, Financial Statements, and Notes to Financial Statements for the corresponding time frame, available on the Company's website.

news.headline: Acumen Pharmaceuticals reports $231.5M cash on Dec 31, 2024. Progress made in Phase 2 study for early Alzheimer's. Topline results expected in late 2026. Financials show increased R&D and net loss from operations. Company to host conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has successfully completed enrollment for its Phase 2 study, ALTITUDE-AD, investigating the use of sabirnetug (ACU193) for early Alzheimer's disease treatment. The study included 542 participants with early Alzheimer's disease. The company expects to unveil the topline results in late 2026. The Phase 1 study exploring a subcutaneous sabirnetug formulation also showed promising results. As of December 31, 2024, the company reported $231.5 million in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, sufficient to support operations until the first half of 2027. Despite increased expenses in research and development in 2024, the company remains optimistic about the potential of sabirnetug in redefining Alzheimer's disease treatment.

news.headline: Sachem Capital Corp reveals $57.5 million revenue in 2024, $43.9 million loss, and $181.7 million shareholders' equity drop.
news.summary: Sachem Capital Corp, specializing in real estate lending, released its 2024 financial results with total revenue at $57.5 million (down from $64.7 million in 2023) and operating costs at $75.3 million (compared to $49.7 million in 2023). The net loss attributable to common shareholders was $43.9 million for 2024. Total assets decreased to $492.0 million by year-end 2024 from $620.9 million in 2023. Liabilities were $310.3 million by the end of 2024. The company paid dividends totaling $15.7 million in 2024. The company will host a webcast and call to discuss these results. You can access the detailed balance sheet and information on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: CalciMedica reports financial results for 2024, with $18.7M cash. Phase 2 trials show 62.7% reduction in mortality. Auxora trials show promising results. Cash position to last till mid-2026. They secured a $32.5M credit facility for further development.
news.summary: CalciMedica Inc. is conducting Phase 2 trials for its drug Auxora™ in patients with acute kidney injury (AKI) and respiratory failure, expecting data by the end of 2025. A post-hoc analysis of the Phase 2 CARDEA trial for severe COVID-19 pneumonia showed a 62.7% relative reduction in mortality for patients treated with Auxora. The company's cash position, including a recent credit facility, is expected to fund operations until mid-2026. Enrollment is ongoing in their Phase 2 CRSPA trial for AIPT, with over 50% enrolled. Financially, as of December 31, 2024, they had $18.7 million in cash and R&D expenses decreased from $15.9 million in 2023 to $14.5 million in 2024. General and administrative expenses decreased from $22.2 million in 2013 to $9.7 million in 2024. Key personnel appointments including a CFO and addition to the Board of Directors were also highlighted. The company is looking to engage with the FDA for Phase 3 trials in different conditions pending further funding.

news.headline: Tidewater Midstream and Infrastructure Ltd. reported $3.3 million net loss in Q4 2024, compared to $331.8 million in Q4 2023. Consolidated adjusted EBITDA was $20.0 million in Q4 2024. For the full year 2024, the net loss was $26.6 million, and adjusted EBITDA was $134.3 million. Numerous financial details and transactions mentioned expanding the corporation's operations and refinancing efforts. CEO Jeremy Baines highlighted accomplishments and future goals. Gov't amendments and debt restructurings were also discussed.
news.summary: Tidewater Midstream and Infrastructure Ltd. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024, showing a consolidated net loss attributable to shareholders of $3.3 million compared to $331.8 million in the same period in 2023. The adjusted EBITDA was $20.0 million for Q4 2024. In 2024, the full-year consolidated net loss was $26.6 million compared to $385.9 million in the previous year. The adjusted EBITDA for the full year 2024 was $134.3 million. Tidewater completed various transactions and refinancings in 2024, including the sale of assets and the refinance of debentures. The company is facing challenges in the market due to oversupply and dumping of subsidized U.S. renewable diesel. This led to filing trade complaints and renegotiations with partners. Additionally, investments were made to ensure compliance with renewable fuel requirements. The company continues its efforts to optimize its operations and asset portfolio, focusing on financial sustainability and growth. CEO Jeremy Baines expressed confidence in the company's ability to generate cash flow and achieve its growth targets.

news.headline: Tidewater Renewables Ltd reported Q4 net loss $3.4M, full-year net loss $357.8M; 2024 Adjusted EBITDA $74.5M. Completed refinancing, sale of assets, biodiesel production & sales up. Focused on future growth despite challenges.
news.summary: Tidewater Renewables Ltd. reported its financial and operating results for Q4 2024 and full-year 2024. In Q4 2024, the corporation had a net loss of $3.4 million, generated Adjusted EBITDA of $6.0 million, with an 89% utilization rate at its HDRD Complex, producing renewable diesel & hydrogen. For the full-year 2024, Tidewater Renewables had a net loss of $357.8 million, but generated Adjusted EBITDA of $74.5 million, with an 88% utilization rate at the HDRD Complex. Over 170 million liters of renewable diesel were produced in 2024. The company showed improvements in its leverage profile, sold assets, reduced cash interest expenses, and refinanced credit facilities. Tidewater also completed a sale transaction in January 2025. The Government of British Columbia announced changes in the Low Carbon Fuels Act, and Tidewater initiated an anti-dumping duty investigation. The corporation successfully amended its credit facilities in March 2025. Selected financial highlights include Q4 revenue of $76.4 million, a net loss per share of $0.09, Adjusted EBITDA of $6.0 million, and total assets of $406.5 million. The full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com for additional details.

news.headline: Terry Lynch joins Quantum BioPharma board, replacing Dr. Sanjiv Chopra. Dr. Chopra stays as advisor.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. (NASDAQ: QNTM) (CSE: QNTM) (FRA: 0K91) announced the appointment of Terry Lynch to its board of directors. Terry Lynch is stepping in for Dr. Sanjiv Chopra, who has resigned from the board. Dr. Chopra will, however, remain involved with the company in an advisory capacity. Quantum BioPharma expressed gratitude for Dr. Chopra's prior contributions.

news.headline: Currency Exchange Int'l (CXI) partners with Agility Forex for a referral agreement, expanding services.
news.summary: In Toronto on March 27, 2025, Currency Exchange International, Corp. (CXI) disclosed a partnership with Agility Forex through a referral agreement. CXI, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol CXI and on the OTC market as CURN, established this collaboration.

news.headline: Plug Power Inc. to attend UBS Global Energy Conference in London, showcasing hydrogen solutions. (c.100 words)
news.summary: In Slingerlands, New York, on March 27, 2025, Plug Power Inc. (NASDAQ: PLUG), a prominent company in providing holistic hydrogen solutions for the green hydrogen sector, is taking part in the UBS Global Energy Conference happening in London, England.

news.headline: Microbix Biosystems Inc. reveals Annual and Special Meeting voting results from March 26, 2025.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, in Mississauga, Ontario, Microbix Biosystems Inc. (TSX: MBX, OTCQB: MBXBF) revealed the outcomes of the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders conducted on March 26, 2025. The Company, recognized as a leader in life sciences and exports, shared the voting results from the meeting.

news.headline: TScan Therapeutics appoints Stephen Camiolo as SVP, Market Access. Mr. Camiolo to leverage commercial readiness in cell therapy launch.
news.summary: Mr. Camiolo joins TScan with a proven track record of commercial readiness and expertise in launching cell therapies.

news.headline: A reverse stock split has been announced by Auddia.
BioStem Technologies to speak at 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global population is expected to reach 9.7 billion by the year 2050, with over half of this growth projected to occur in Africa. The current world population stands at around 7.8 billion. Additionally, it is estimated that by 2030, there will be approximately 1.4 billion more people living in cities globally, totaling around 5 billion urban residents. This significant urban population growth will bring about various challenges related to infrastructure, housing, and resources. The report also highlights the importance of sustainable development to address the needs of this growing population while preserving the environment.

news.headline: EyePoint Pharma (NASDAQ: EYPT) to present at 2025 RBC Capital Markets Ophthalmology Virtual Conference on 4/4/2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: EyePoint Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a company focused on advancing innovative therapeutics for serious retinal diseases, revealed that Jay S. Duker, M.D., the company's President and CEO, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the 2025 RBC Capital Markets Ophthalmology Conference on April 4, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. ET. It operates under the NASDAQ symbol EYPT and aims to enhance the lives of patients with such conditions. This event will provide a platform for Dr. Duker to share insights and discuss the company's progress and future prospects.

news.headline: CalciMedica reports 2024 financial results, enrollment ongoing in Phase 2 KOURAGE trial, data expected end of 2025.
news.summary: Auxora™ is currently being tested in Phase 2 of the KOURAGE trial for patients with acute kidney injury (AKI) and respiratory failure, with enrollment ongoing. Data from this trial is anticipated to be released by the conclusion of 2025. An additional post-hoc analysis conducted on a specific group of patients with AKI from the Phase 2 CARDEA trial, which focused on severe COVID-19 pneumonia, demonstrated a 62.7% relative improvement in outcomes.

news.headline: Hudbay Minerals Inc. announces annual reserve update and three-year production outlook, all amounts in USD.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Hudbay Minerals Inc. (Hudbay) made public its yearly mineral reserve and resource report along with a fresh three-year production forecast. The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and New York Stock Exchange under the tickers HBM, shared this information. The figures provided in the update are denominated in U.S. dollars by default.

news.headline: Ashish Patel, PhD, joins Nanoscope as Senior VP of Sales and Marketing to aid in restoring vision; Mar 27, 2025.
news.summary: In Dallas on March 27, 2025, Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a biotech firm dedicated to tackling vision loss from retinal degenerative diseases, revealed the addition of Ashish Patel, PhD, as Senior Vice President. Patel's expertise will further the company's mission to restore vision in those affected by blindness, with a focus on diseases impacting the retina.

news.headline: PAX Services Group acquires Hi-Tech Roofing & Sheet Metal, expanding presence in Florida. - March 27, 2025
news.summary: PAX Services Group, a prominent provider of roofing and exterior services, has broadened its reach in Florida by acquiring Hi-Tech Roofing & Sheet Metal, a company based in South Florida. This addition was confirmed on March 27, 2025. This acquisition denotes PAX's strategic expansion in the region, enhancing their market presence and capabilities.

news.headline: Arvinas to present Phase 1 study data on ARV-102 at 2025 Alzheimer’s & Parkinson’s Diseases Conference. First-in-human data from healthy volunteers.
news.summary: The company will present initial data from the first human trial of ARV-102, a investigational PROTAC LRRK2 degrader. The study involved healthy volunteers and included both single-ascending and multiple-ascending dose segments in Phase 1. This data will provide insight into the safety and efficacy of the drug.

news.headline: Polaris (NYSE: PII) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 29, 2025 at 9:00 AM CT, followed by conference call.
news.summary: Polaris Inc. (NYSE: PII) has disclosed plans to unveil its financial report for the first quarter of 2025 on April 29, 2025. They have scheduled a conference call and webcast for 9:00 AM central time on the same day to delve into the numbers and performance details. The update will cover important figures and insights regarding the company's financial standing and operational outcomes.

news.headline: ZINFI releases guidebook on Partner Advisory Councils. Explains how to enhance engagement. - Pleasanton, CA, March 27, 2025.
news.summary: In a recent release, a thorough examination of advisory councils is provided, detailing how businesses can utilize them to improve partner engagement, support, and collaboration. This publication was issued by ZINFI Technologies, Inc., an industry frontrunner in Pleasanton, California. The release was made on March 27, 2025, as announced by PRNewswire. This informative piece delves into the benefits and strategies surrounding advisory councils, offering valuable insights to businesses seeking to optimize these structures for growth and success.

news.headline: Hudbay achieves 100% ownership of Copper Mountain Mine from MMC for US$4.5 million upfront, with potential $39.75 million in future payments. Hudbay to settle CMBC's $104 million intercompany loan.
news.summary: Hudbay Minerals Inc. has announced on March 27, 2025, its agreement with Mitsubishi Materials Corporation to acquire MMC's 25% stake in Copper Mountain Mine (BC) Ltd. for US$4.5 million upfront and a potential additional US$39.75 million in deferred and contingent payments. The transaction also entails Hudbay taking on full responsibility for settling CMBC's outstanding obligations, which includes an intercompany loan amounting to roughly US$104 million, where the 25% share is around US$26 million. The company's stock can be found on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol HBM.

news.headline: Keeper Security reveals new WearOS app for Android smartwatches for easy password management.
news.summary: A recently launched app named Keeper WearOS for Android offers a smooth and safe smartwatch experience. Released on March 27, 2025, in Chicago, this app is developed by Keeper Security, a top cybersecurity company specializing in zero-trust and zero-knowledge Privileged Access Management (PAM) software to safeguard passwords.

news.headline: Nayya Report: $3T employer benefits spend not benefiting employees. Wasted underused benefits raise concerns.
news.summary: Recently released data highlights the significant financial inefficiency resulting from underutilized benefits programs. This raises concerns about the effectiveness of offering these programs without implementing substantial systemic alterations. As employees increasingly ignore these benefits and fail to make use of them, HR departments are compelled to take on the additional responsibility of financial education.

news.headline: Fast Guard Service launches nationwide event security push for 2025 major events offering customized planning and expert coverage.
news.summary: Fast Guard Service, a top security firm, is providing tailored security planning, on-site assistance, and professional event protection for the 2025 major events. With the event season in full swing nationwide, the company is emphasizing its commitment to comprehensive security solutions.

news.headline: GridPoint secures $45M funding for global expansion, with $20M from Marunouchi Innovation Partners.
news.summary: Marunouchi Innovation Partners' climate technology fund has concluded GridPoint's fundraising by making a significant $20 million strategic investment. On March 27, 2025, GridPoint, a prominent player in energy management technology focusing on decarbonizing commercial buildings, received this investment.

news.headline: Chestnut Carbon enrolls 160K+ acres in IFM program branded as "Forest Carbon Works", reducing carbon footprint.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 27, 2025, Chestnut Carbon revealed that they have successfully enrolled more than 160,000 acres into their Improved Forest Management (IFM) membership program called "Forest Carbon Works." This nature-based carbon project developer has witnessed significant growth since its establishment.

news.headline: Moneypenny celebrates 25 years by uniting all US brands, including VoiceNation and Alphapage, under one brand.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Moneypenny, a global leader in customer conversation solutions, is celebrating its 25th anniversary by consolidating its brands in the United States. This includes VoiceNation and Alphapage, among others. Since its inception in 2000, the company has been known for its outstanding service and dedication to innovation. The move to bring all brands under the Moneypenny umbrella signifies a significant step in the company's growth and expansion.

news.headline: Halifax Group appoints Howard Miller as Operating Executive to support Pharma Services investments. (char limit: 93)
news.summary: A Senior Pharma and Life Sciences Specialist has been appointed to assist in overseeing the firm's investments in pharmaceutical services. The Halifax Group, a middle market private equity firm based in Washington, made the announcement on March 27, 2025. The firm collaborates with management teams to invest in top-performing companies.The new expert will bring essential industry experience to the team, fostering strategic growth initiatives for the firm's pharmaceutical services investments.

news.headline: Cyble ranked as Leader in 2025 SPARK Matrix™ for Digital Threat Intelligence Management by QKS Group, with strong ratings.
news.summary: The QKS Group released its latest SPARK Matrix™ evaluating Digital Threat Intelligence Management vendors. Cyble, a prominent player in the field, scored well across various technology benchmarks. Known for its robust technology in Digital Threat Intelligence Management, Cyble received high ratings in the analysis, further solidifying its leading position in the industry.

news.headline: Ascentage Pharma reports full year 2024 financial results and updates; engaged in discovering therapies for hematological malignancies.
news.summary: Ascentage Pharma Group International, a biopharmaceutical company based in Rockville, Md. and Suzhou, China, recently disclosed its unaudited financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The company, trading as Ascentage Pharma on NASDAQ (AAPG) and HKEX (6855), focuses on developing therapies for hematological malignancies. With a global reach, Ascentage Pharma aims to address crucial medical needs. The update, released on March 27, 2025, highlighted key clinical and commercial advancements made by the company.

news.headline: ThreatQuotient ranked as Leader in SPARK Matrix™ for Digital Threat Intelligence Management by QKS Group for 2025.
news.summary: The QKS Group SPARK Matrix™ evaluates and ranks top Digital Threat Intelligence Management vendors based on competitive analysis. ThreatQuotient stands out with high ratings in various parameters for its comprehensive technology in this field.

news.headline: Acumen Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: ABOS) releases financial results for year ending Dec 31, 2024 and business highlights.
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts on March 27, 2025, Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABOS) released their financial report for the year ending December 31, 2024. The company, focused on developing a unique therapeutic targeting toxic soluble amyloid beta oligomers (AβOs) to address Alzheimer’s disease (AD), shared their financial performance and business progress. The report marks key milestones and achievements in their clinical-stage biopharmaceutical endeavors.

news.headline: Graphite One triples their proven and probable reserves with updated resource estimates after completing 2023 and 2024 drilling programs, supported by DOD funding. Feasibility Study to be filed in April 2025.
news.summary: Graphite One recently concluded its 2023 and 2024 drilling programs, boosted by funding from the Department of Defense. These initiatives have significantly increased the measured and indicated resource, as well as the proven and probable reserve. A Feasibility Study compliant with NI 43-101 standards is set to be submitted in April 2025. It is expected to show a triple growth...

news.headline: Winnebago Industries saw improved profitability in Q2 2025 with $100 million debt reduction for capital efficiency.
news.summary: Boosting sequential profitability, the company reported significant margin growth across all segments. In a strategic move, they successfully concluded a $100 million high yield debt tender, aiming to enhance capital efficiency by reducing debt burden.

news.headline: Full Circle Lithium and US Fire Pump work together on FCL-X™ vehicles to tackle lithium-ion battery fires; successfully extinguished 3 fires in demos.
news.summary: A collaboration has been established to introduce FCL-X™ to consumers and improve emergency response for lithium-ion battery fires. The innovative response vehicles have effectively put out fires linked to electric vehicles, including one EV fire and two EV battery fires during a recent demonstration. This initiative aims to enhance safety measures and response strategies for such emergencies.

news.headline: Boundless Bio reports financial results for 2024, ongoing BBI-355 trial for oncogene amplified cancers, with proof of concept data expected in 2nd half 2025.
news.summary: A Phase 1/2 POTENTIATE trial, named BBI-355, is currently underway for patients diagnosed with oncogene amplified cancers. The trial is anticipated to provide initial proof of concept data by the latter half of 2025.

news.headline: Related Companies energizes data centers with $500M investment, plans $8B capital raise for $45B pipeline. New exec hires announced.
news.summary: Related Digital has announced a commitment of at least $500 million to drive rapid expansion and has initiated a capital raising campaign of up to $8 billion. The company has welcomed key executives, such as Brent Behrman as Chief Investment Officer and Greg Myers as Chief Financial Officer. This investment and leadership restructuring aim to bolster growth and strategic initiatives within the company.

news.headline: Bitfarms revenue up 21% to $56M in Q4 2024 with 47% gross mining margin; 18.6 EHuM produced, 186% increase YoY.
news.summary: A revenue of $56 million was reported, showing a 21% increase year-over-year. The gross mining margin was 47%, a decline from 57% in Q4 2023. The company saw an impressive growth in 18.6 EHuM, which surged by 186% from the previous quarter. Current efficiency stands at 19w/TH, marking a significant 45% enhancement from Q4 2023. The total energy pipeline comprises approximately 1.4 GW, with around 80% located in the United States. Furthermore, the acquisition of Stronghold Digital Mining was successfully completed, along with the sale of the Yguazu data center in Paraguay.

news.headline: Survey highlights challenges in treating schizophrenia & bipolar I disorder. 98% providers agree on importance of medication adherence in improving patients' quality of life.
news.summary: In a recent survey, healthcare providers expressed medication adherence as a primary concern when choosing treatments. Frequent changes in medication were highlighted for their substantial effects on patients' quality of life and experiences. An overwhelming 98% of respondents agreed on the paramount importance of quality of life in patient care decisions.

news.headline: BioXcel Therapeutics surpassed 60% enrollment in Phase 3 trial with 200 patients for treating agitation in bipolar disorders and schizophrenia.
news.summary: Over 60% of the necessary patients have been enrolled in the SERENITY At-Home pivotal Phase 3 safety trial, which aims to evaluate the effectiveness of acute treatment for agitation linked to bipolar disorders or schizophrenia. The trial is set to include 200 patients in total.

news.headline: BeyondSpring reports 2024 financial results, highlighting clinical & strategic milestones globally.
news.summary: Florham Park, New Jersey - On March 27, 2025, BeyondSpring Inc. (NASDAQ: BYSI), a leading global clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on groundbreaking cancer treatments, revealed its financial outcomes for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. Additionally, the Company shared significant updates regarding key clinical advancements and corporate milestones.

news.headline: Gain Therapeutics reports financial results for Q4 and year-end 2024. Phase 1b study of GT-02287 in Parkinson's Disease for Q2 2025.
news.summary: The preliminary results of the Phase 1b clinical trial for GT-02287 in Parkinson's disease are anticipated to be released in the second quarter of 2025. This study aims to evaluate the safety and efficacy of GT-02287 in individuals with Parkinson's disease. The analysis is a crucial step in determining the potential of GT-02287 as a treatment for this neurodegenerative disorder. Stay tuned for updates on this milestone in the development of a promising therapy for Parkinson's disease.

news.headline: Shattuck Labs' financial results for Q4 2024 and full-year 2024 reported; preclinical data presented for SL-325 at ECCO 2025.
news.summary: At the 20th Congress of European Crohn’s and Colitis Organization in Inflammatory Bowel Diseases 2025 (ECCO), preclinical non-human primate (NHP) data for SL-325, a novel blocking antibody targeting the DR3 receptor for TL1A, was presented. The data highlighted a positive safety profile, complete receptor occupancy, and absence of DR3 agonism. The findings suggest potential promise for SL-325 in the treatment of inflammatory bowel diseases.
